summary: A Newsmax2 remote interview with ICE Acting Executive Associate Director Marcos Charles vowing ICE's mission stays the same despite mayors and governors, citing National Guard deployment, with Portland protest b-roll. It is a televised news interview, not a produced, music-driven youth-appeal piece.
notable_text: NEWSMAX2; 'TRUMP THREATENS TO LOCK UP PRITZKER'; 'Marcos Charles | ICE Acting Executive Associate Director'
